title: Richly Glazed Korean Chicken Bowl
description: A sweet and savory Korean-inspired chicken dish featuring a jammy, glassy-jelly glaze, served in a traditional lacquerware bowl.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey to make the glaze.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook until browned and cooked through.
In a small saucepan, bring the remaining glaze to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the glaze for 5 minutes, or until thickened and jammy.
To serve, place the cooked chicken in a lacquerware bowl and brush with the glaze.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
